title: Syngenta Drug Screen Protocol
author: Ida Barlow
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.9vqh65w
materials: Protocol parameters: # multichannel pipette parameters and tipracks multi_pipette_type = 'p10-Multi' multi_pipette_mount = 'left' tiprackdrugs_slots = ['3'] tiprackdrugs_type = 'opentrons-tiprack-10ul' tiprackdrugs_startfrom = '1' tiprackH2O_slot = '6' tiprackH2O_type = 'opentrons-tiprack-10ul' # tiprackH2O_startfrom = '1' # water trough H2O_source_slot = '9' H2O_source_type = 'trough-12row' H2O_source_well = 'A1' H2O_volume = 5 # drugs source drugs_source_slots = '2'#,'5','8','11'] drugs_source_type = '96-well-plate-pcr-thermofisher' frombottom_off = +0.3 # mm from bottom of src wells drugs_volume = 3 # destination plates agar_thickness = +3.7 # mm from the bottom of the well for 200ul agar per well destination_slots = ['1','4','7', '5'] destination_type = '96-well-plate-sqfb-whatman' n_columns = 12 # create mapping from sources to destination. seed = 20191031 # for reproducibility. Let's use the experimental date for the actual experiment, something else for debugging np.random.seed(seed)
Make sure all labware is loaded correctly
Allow the plates to dry for 30 minutes
Use wormsorter to dispense 2 worms per well

steps.title: Bleach worms prepared for day 1 tracking
steps.instruction: Bleach worms prepared for day 1 tracking: Bleach synchronisation of C. elegans by Ida Barlow Adaptations: - remix pellet after each wash

steps.title: Label each DESTINATION plate with the...
steps.instruction: Label each DESTINATION plate with the source plate the DESTINATION SLOT in the opentrons robot.

steps.title: Prepare drug source plates in skirted...
steps.instruction: Prepare drug source plates in skirted 96 well plate so that each column corresponds to a single drug at a single concentration. The final concentration of DMSO should be 0.1%.

steps.title: Run opentrons robot using prepared protocol
steps.instruction: Run opentrons robot using prepared protocol. NB. - One drug source plate with each column corresponding to a drug for use with a multichannel pipette. - Destination and source plate locations are specified. - The opentrons robot will randomise the column locations from each source plate to a destination plate - The date is used as the random seed

steps.title: Run protocol and monitor robot to...
steps.instruction: Run protocol and monitor robot to ensure all the tips are removed

steps.title: Tip racks have to replaced after...
steps.instruction: Tip racks have to replaced after each destination plate is filled

steps.title: Use VIAFILL dispenser to dispense 5...
steps.instruction: Use VIAFILL dispenser to dispense 5 µL 1:10 diluted OP50 into each well of each drug plate

steps.title: Allow to dry for 30 minutes under the flow hood
steps.instruction: Allow to dry for 30 minutes under the flow hood

steps.title: Keep at room temperature over night...
steps.instruction: Keep at room temperature over night (covered in the dark as some drugs are light-sensitive)

steps.title: Wash worms off the 150mm plates...
steps.instruction: Wash worms off the 150mm plates with M9 using a pasteur pipette into 15ml falcons

steps.title: Spin at 1500 rpm, ascending 9,...
steps.instruction: Spin at 1500 rpm, ascending 9, descending 7 for 2 minutes to pellet the worms

steps.title: Remove supernatent and fill M9
steps.instruction: Remove supernatent and fill M9

steps.title: Repeats steps 12-13 two more times
steps.instruction: Repeats steps 12-13 two more times

steps.title: After final wash fill falcon with...
steps.instruction: After final wash fill falcon with M9, transfer contents of 15mL falcons to 50mL and fill up to 45mL with M9.

steps.title: Allow liquid to dry off the...
steps.instruction: Allow liquid to dry off the plates for 30 mins under the flow hood

steps.title: Incubate in drug for 4 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate in drug for 4 hours

steps.title: Pick L4 worms onto 4 x...
steps.instruction: Pick L4 worms onto 4 x OP50-seeded NGM 90mm plates (10 worms per plate) for day 1 of tracking

steps.title: At 17:00 Refeed L1s for day...
steps.instruction: At 17:00 Refeed L1s for day 1 tracking onto 5 x 150mm plates as in protocol above by dropping 4 small droplets around the edges of the plate (off food). Wash worms once before refeeding Keep worms at 20 °C

steps.title: At 17:00 Refeed L1s for day...
steps.instruction: At 17:00 Refeed L1s for day 2 tracking onto 5 x 150mm plates as in protocol above by dropping 4 small droplets around the edges of the plate (off food). Wash worms once before refeeding Keep worms at 20 °C

steps.title: Bleach worms prepared for day 2...
steps.instruction: Bleach worms prepared for day 2 tracking and keep at 20 °C in rotatotor until refeeding: Bleach synchronisation of C. elegans by Ida Barlow Adaptations: - remix pellet after each wash

steps.title: Once agar has cooled and salts...
steps.instruction: Once agar has cooled and salts have been added pour agar into 65 x 96 well plates using VIAFILL dispenser. Dispense 200 µL per well. Once cooled, store lidside down in airtight container at 4 °C .

steps.title: Prepare 1
steps.instruction: Prepare 1.5L low peptone NGM and autoclave

steps.title: Pick L4 worms onto 4 x...
steps.instruction: Pick L4 worms onto 4 x OP50-seeded NGM 90mm plates (10 worms per plate) for day 2 of tracking

steps.title: Place in flow hood for 3...
steps.instruction: Place in flow hood for 3 hours to allow to dry (with lids off)

steps.title: Use VIAFLO to fill 30 x...
steps.instruction: Use VIAFLO to fill 30 x SOURCE plates with 7 µL water and 0.5 µL drug from STOCK plates.
